project.name: Wasmtime4j Native
project.description: Native library integration for Wasmtime WebAssembly runtime

arguments.argument: echo "Checking Rust toolchain..." ; rustc --version ; echo "Rust compiler: OK"

echo "Validating cross-compilation targets..." ; rustup target list --installed | grep -q "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu" || echo "- Linux x86_64 target missing" ; rustup target list --installed | grep -q "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu" || echo "- Linux aarch64 target missing" ; rustup target list --installed | grep -q "x86_64-pc-windows-msvc" || echo "- Windows x86_64 target missing" ; rustup target list --installed | grep -q "x86_64-apple-darwin" || echo "- macOS x86_64 target missing" ; rustup target list --installed | grep -q "aarch64-apple-darwin" || echo "- macOS aarch64 target missing" ; echo "Cross-compilation targets validation completed"

echo.message: Verifying Wasmtime source download for version ${wasmtime.version}

fail.message: Wasmtime source not properly extracted - missing Cargo.toml
